description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These red canvas flats from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to dresses. The simple woven design is perfect for everyday wear.UpperWoven straps on the forefoot with straps extending to the midfoot for added style and a snug FitCanvas heel cup with a synthetic leather lining for added comfortElasticated straps emerging from the collar and flowing to the sides for a snug fitSynthetic leather lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
